results.title: 2026/27 loan move could determine 23-year-old’s Millwall future: Opinion
results.description: Millwall must make a decision soon on Kamarl Grant’s future, and a loan move could be the best option to identify his place in the squad. Millwall will have several players who need temporary moves away ahead of next season.
